completed_tasks.name: Wire dynamic prompt into all 4 call sites + preference echo

blockers.description: Windows Python 3.13 missing tzdata — zoneinfo.ZoneInfo('UTC') fails
blockers.workaround: Fixed in app/utils/time.py — uses datetime.timezone.utc for UTC. Non-UTC zones still need tzdata (fine on Linux VPS).

blockers.description: aiosqlite double thread-start — async with await get_db() pattern broken
blockers.workaround: Fixed in app/storage/db.py — converted get_db() to @asynccontextmanager. All callers now use async with get_db().

human_actions_pending.action: Connect to VPS and run 5 deferred verification items
human_actions_pending.context: All structural tests pass (33/33). Live Ollama required for: PERS-02 history recall, CTX-01 token budget, CTX-02 task injection, CTX-03 restart signal, PERS-03 20-turn auto-summarize.
Scheduled reminders (jobs.py) require the job-queue extra. Currently disabled on Windows dev — will work on Linux VPS.

decisions.decision: capability refusal is keyword+intent based (not intent-only)
No behavior_preferences table — existing preferences table fulfils that role
decisions.rationale: Avoided unnecessary migration; Phase 2 reads from preferences directly

decisions.decision: build_system_prompt() assembles preferences + personality_traits + active persona
decisions.rationale: All 3 sources needed for full personality expression

decisions.decision: ContextBudgetManager wraps system prompt + history + tasks — replaces bare build_system_prompt() in call sites
decisions.rationale: Single assembly point for full context; Phase 2 prompt becomes one section within the budget

decisions.decision: History cap: 16 messages (8 exchanges) in-memory, full history in DB
decisions.rationale: Balance between context richness and token budget; summaries capture what cache drops

decisions.decision: Token trim: oldest history pairs first, never trim system prompt or current message
decisions.rationale: Preserves identity and current query; sacrifices oldest context first

uncommitted_files: .planning/config.json (model_profile budget, _auto_chain_active false — minor config drift, safe to commit or ignore)
next_action: Connect VPS, start Ollama, run python -m app.main, then execute the 5 deferred verification steps in 03-VERIFICATION.md
context_notes: Milestone v1.0 fully executed and verified structurally. Bot runs on Windows dev machine — started OK, tasks/notes work, tzdata and db bugs found and fixed during live testing. Deferred 5 live-Ollama checks to VPS. All 11 plans across 3 phases committed. MILESTONE-DEMO.md written.
